channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-level context Modeling for consistent expert selection in Mixture-of-Experts
item.description: MCF-MOE improves Mixture-of-Experts routing consistency by integrating cross-layer context signals for more stable expert selection in language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RIMS: Preference Optimization via Smoothed Multi-pair Aggregation for Small-Scale LLM Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: RIMS framework optimizes small language models for retrieval-augmented generation using smoothed preference aggregation, improving performance on question answering tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Committed Before Reasoning: Behavioral Reproduction and Preliminary Activation-Level Evidence of Answer Pre-Commitment in an Open-Weight LLM
item.description: LLMs pre-commit to answers before reasoning, then generate post-hoc justification for those answers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Encoding EEG Signals to Examine Human-Like Next-Word Prediction Behaviour in Language Models
item.description: Language models' next-word prediction accuracy doesn't necessarily capture human cognitive processing patterns shown in EEG signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NOWJ@COLIEE 2026: Adaptive Pipelines for Legal Retrieval and Reasoning
item.description: NOWJ team presents adaptive pipelines combining retrieval, reranking, and LLM reasoning for five legal tasks in COLIEE 2026 competition.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Memory to Skills: Evidence-Grounded Co-Evolution Governance for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
item.description: MSCE converts LLM agent memory into evidence-backed reusable skills, demonstrating improved long-horizon performance and cross-domain transferability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] OpenLanguageModel: Readable and Composable Small-Language-Model Pretraining for Education and Research
item.description: OpenLanguageModel is an open-source PyTorch library for building and pretraining small language models with readable, composable code for research and education.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SpecLA: Efficient Speculative Decoding for Linear-Attention Models
item.description: SpecLA enables speculative decoding for linear-attention models using topology-aware verification, achieving 1.70x speedup over standard autoregressive decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Are Arithmetic Heuristic Neurons Form-Invariant? A Mechanistic Analysis of Symbols, Text, and Code in LLMs
item.description: Are Arithmetic Heuristic Neurons Form-Invariant? A Mechanistic Analysis of Symbols, Text, and Code in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Though Language Models Err While They Strive: Conformal Prediction for Self-Correcting Scientific Generation
item.description: Though Language Models Err While They Strive: Conformal Prediction for Self-Correcting Scientific Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] JOR-Bench: Japanese Operations Research Benchmarks for Large Language Models
item.description: JOR-Bench: Japanese Operations Research Benchmarks for Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cascading versus Joint Modeling for Hierarchical Offensive Language Detection
item.description: Cascading versus Joint Modeling for Hierarchical Offensive Language Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Diagnosing Correctness Probes under Self-Judgement Confounding
item.description: Diagnosing Correctness Probes under Self-Judgement Confounding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Schema-Constrained Document-Level Event Argument Extraction with Lightweight LLM Fine-Tuning
item.description: Schema-Constrained Document-Level Event Argument Extraction with Lightweight LLM Fine-Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization
item.description: Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Trace-Based On-Policy Distillation for Masked Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Trace-Based On-Policy Distillation for Masked Diffusion Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Real-World Evaluation of an AI Agent Drafting Translational Impact Summaries
item.description: Real-World Evaluation of an AI Agent Drafting Translational Impact Summaries

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Learning from Synthetic Data without Model Collapse in Iterative Instruction Tuning
item.description: Learning from Synthetic Data without Model Collapse in Iterative Instruction Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BLAD: A Historically Contextualized, Multilingual Dataset of Bangladeshi Legal Acts (1799 to 2025)
item.description: BLAD: A Historically Contextualized, Multilingual Dataset of Bangladeshi Legal Acts (1799 to 2025)

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scope3Trace: Evidence-Based Identification and Extraction of Scope 3 GHG Emissions from Sustainability Reports
item.description: Scope3Trace: Evidence-Based Identification and Extraction of Scope 3 GHG Emissions from Sustainability Reports

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] KyrgyzLLM-Bench: Benchmarking Kyrgyz Language Understanding
item.description: KyrgyzLLM-Bench: Benchmarking Kyrgyz Language Understanding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Auditing Question-Order Effects in Large Language Models with the QQ Equality: Mechanism Characterization and a Saturation Caveat
item.description: Auditing Question-Order Effects in Large Language Models with the QQ Equality: Mechanism Characterization and a Saturation Caveat

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Literary Non-Style in LLM-Generated Text
item.description: Literary Non-Style in LLM-Generated Text

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Robust Summarization of Doctor-Patient Conversations: TalTech Systems for the Beyond Transcription Challenge
item.description: Robust Summarization of Doctor-Patient Conversations: TalTech Systems for the Beyond Transcription Challenge

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AI_LectureNote: A Retrospective Pilot Study of a Post-ASR Workflow for English-Script Rendering and Semantic Drift in Korean-English Medical Lectures
item.description: AI_LectureNote: A Retrospective Pilot Study of a Post-ASR Workflow for English-Script Rendering and Semantic Drift in Korean-English Medical Lectures

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
item.description: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Should Missing Modalities Always Be Necessary to Repair for Multi-modal Sentiment Analysis?
item.description: Should Missing Modalities Always Be Necessary to Repair for Multi-modal Sentiment Analysis?

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Debate-on-Graph: Reliable and Adaptive Reasoning of Large Language Model on Uncertain Knowledge Graph
item.description: Debate-on-Graph: Reliable and Adaptive Reasoning of Large Language Model on Uncertain Knowledge Graph

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Safety That Does Not Transfer: Cross-Lingual Clinical Correctness Drift in Deployable Medical Language Models
item.description: Safety That Does Not Transfer: Cross-Lingual Clinical Correctness Drift in Deployable Medical Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Team DACTYL at PAN 2026: Bayesian Data Mixing and Empirical X-risk Minimization for AI-text Detection
item.description: Team DACTYL at PAN 2026: Bayesian Data Mixing and Empirical X-risk Minimization for AI-text Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reinforcement Learning-Guided NSGA-II Enhanced with Gray Relational Coefficient for Multi-Objective Optimization: Application to NASDAQ Portfolio Optimization
item.description: Researchers propose RL-NSGA-II-GRC, a reinforcement learning-enhanced genetic algorithm for multi-objective portfolio optimization achieving improved convergence and Pareto front quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DocOCR-Eval: A Correction-Based Framework for OCR Tool Selection Without Ground Truth
item.description: DocOCR-Eval automatically selects OCR tools for document parsing without ground truth using correction-based evaluation across MLLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fully-sensorized smart-eyewear platform for on-device Machine Learning
item.description: ARGO smart eyewear platform enables on-device machine learning for obstacle recognition using STM32N6 microcontroller with integrated NPU, achieving 10 FPS with ~113 minutes battery autonomy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM Unlearning for Cyber Defense: A Survey on Methods, Challenges, and Emerging Threats
item.description: Survey examines LLM unlearning as cybersecurity defense, questioning whether current methods genuinely remove encoded sensitive data or only suppress expression.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Operator-Aware Mixed-Precision Tolerance Calibration for Tensor Kernels
item.description: Operator-aware tolerance calibration using empirical error analysis improves tensor kernel bug detection recall from 73% to 82%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RouteCost: A Production-Inspired Multi-Stage Framework for Pre-Order Shipping Cost Estimation in E-Commerce
item.description: RouteCost is a multi-stage framework for estimating e-commerce shipping costs using demand forecasting, baseline pricing, and box-consolidation inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Orthogonal Gradient Constraints Shape Noisy-Label Memorization Dynamics
item.description: OrthoGrad orthogonalizes weight gradients to reduce noisy-label memorization in small-data regimes, but effects diminish in larger-data settings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Weights to Words: Expressing and Editing Preference Model Inferences in Natural Language
item.description: Method automatically converts preference model weights into interpretable natural language dimensions, enabling user inspection and real-time editing of model inferences.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction
item.description: Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HantaWatch: Federated Learning for Hantavirus Genomic Surveillance
item.description: HantaWatch: Federated Learning for Hantavirus Genomic Surveillance

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models
item.description: OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Failures of Marginal Influence-Based Attribution Methods for Global Time Series Explanations
item.description: The Failures of Marginal Influence-Based Attribution Methods for Global Time Series Explanations

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantizing Recursive Reasoning Models
item.description: Quantizing Recursive Reasoning Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diffusion-corrected Autoregressive Fourier Neural Operator for Droplet Evolution Prediction
item.description: Diffusion-corrected Autoregressive Fourier Neural Operator for Droplet Evolution Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BACON: Budgeted Human Calibration for Modeling and Evaluation with Multiple AI Judges
item.description: BACON: Budgeted Human Calibration for Modeling and Evaluation with Multiple AI Judges

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Normalized Rewards for Preference Optimization
item.description: Normalized Rewards for Preference Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] KernelBench-Verified: Do LLM-Generated Kernels Actually Beat PyTorch?
item.description: KernelBench-Verified: Do LLM-Generated Kernels Actually Beat PyTorch?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TRACE: Trajectory-Based Safety Patch Learning for LLM Post-Training Realignment
item.description: TRACE: Trajectory-Based Safety Patch Learning for LLM Post-Training Realignment

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RobustMAD: Evaluating Real-World Robustness of Multimodal Small Language Models for Deployable Anomaly Detection Assistants
item.description: RobustMAD: Evaluating Real-World Robustness of Multimodal Small Language Models for Deployable Anomaly Detection Assistants

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CIGPO: Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Evidence-Reading LLM Agents
item.description: CIGPO: Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Evidence-Reading LLM Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks
item.description: Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Let the Data Decide: Supervision Analysis, Capability Trade-offs, and Adaptive Objective Routing in Continued Pre-Training via Off-Policy Distillation
item.description: Let the Data Decide: Supervision Analysis, Capability Trade-offs, and Adaptive Objective Routing in Continued Pre-Training via Off-Policy Distillation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory for Proactive Embodied Safety
item.description: Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory for Proactive Embodied Safety

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration
item.description: High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Multi-Omics-Based Breast Cancer Prediction
item.description: Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Multi-Omics-Based Breast Cancer Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models from Pure Synthetic Data
item.description: Learning Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models from Pure Synthetic Data

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SOS-LoRA: Static Orthogonal-Subspace Low-Rank Adaptation with Fixed Multi-Scale Scaling
item.description: SOS-LoRA: Static Orthogonal-Subspace Low-Rank Adaptation with Fixed Multi-Scale Scaling

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Comprehensive Evaluation of Machine Learning for Type 2 Diabetes Risk Prediction: Large-Scale External Validation and Fairness Analysis
item.description: Comprehensive Evaluation of Machine Learning for Type 2 Diabetes Risk Prediction: Large-Scale External Validation and Fairness Analysis

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] More Than Memory: Task-Conditioned Signed FFN Writes in Long-Context Retrieval
item.description: More Than Memory: Task-Conditioned Signed FFN Writes in Long-Context Retrieval

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Feature Generation Using LLMs: An Evolutionary Algorithm Approach
item.description: Feature Generation Using LLMs: An Evolutionary Algorithm Approach
